◎译　　名　莱罗伊的故事
◎片　　名　Author: The JT LeRoy Story

◎简　　介  

　　As the definitive look inside the mysterious case of 16-year-old literary sensation JT LeRoy—a creature so perfect for his time that if he didn't exist, someone would have had to invent him—this is the strangest story about story ever told.Sundance - World Premiere

　　电影奖 最佳纪录片剧本(提名)
